title: Spaas Unscented Festive Pillar Candle 70/130 mm, 60 Hours, Silver
features: Benefits: does not drip, self-extinguishing wick, coloured to the core
Scent: unscented, enjoy a cosy evening with the flickering flame of unscented candles
Burn time: ± 60 hours, because of the long burning time, you can enlighten your moment during several evenings
Quality: Spaas' candles are carefully made conform the highest quality standards. We find it important to make products that do what they are promised to do, with safety.
description: Product Description Rustic candle is an all-time favourite because of its robust appeal and the translucent glow it casts when you light it. Spaas has created this rustic candle in several festive colours. The candle is created especially for the winter season, making it even easier to incorporate this popular candle in your festive seasonal decorations. Safety Warning Keep away from flammable materials. Do not leave burning candle unattended. Monitor burn time. Extinguish candle when 2 cm of wax remains. Place candle on a heat-resistant surface. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Box Contains 1x Rustic Pillar 70/130mm Silver See more
